reviews.author: I.V.
reviews.text: He was very professional, kind and helpful... He made me feel safe with the repairs
reviews.notes: Partial quote from Nextdoor — ellipsis represents truncation in source.

reviews.author: Phanesia Pharel
reviews.text: Robert has saved me twice in the last 24 hours. Needless to say I suck with cars, but he has been kind fair and timely. He really is the best. You are in great hands. Call him.

reviews.author: Anthony
reviews.text: Robert responded quickly to my request. Offered quick repair service the same day. He explained what my issue could be based on the symptoms I described.  When he arrived to my home, he diagnosed my vehicle and offered an estimate for repairs.  The repairs were completed in a very timely manner.  Based on my 1st experience,  I would recommend Robert's Mobile Mechanic services.

reviews.author: Lamonda Pete
reviews.text: As a woman, I’m often concerned about mechanics getting over me. That was the complete opposite of my experience with Robert. Robert communicates clearly and showed up right on time. My friend and I replaced my car battery, but the car still wouldn’t turn on. Robert came and immediately knew what was wrong. He tightened my bolts and cleaned the connectors for me. Within 10 minutes, my car was up and running. He adjusted the price based on his service and recommended that I return the starter I bought in advance. I’ll most certainly be using Robert’s service moving forward. I can’t thank him enough!

reviews.author: Leanne Ellerbee
reviews.text: Robert is fast and efficient with repairs, very knowledgeable and I trust he will do a great job every time. I cannot recommend him enough!!  He fixed an issue  on my mothers car that had been sitting for 2 years and we are so grateful ⭐️

reviews.author: miranda smith
reviews.text: This man is heaven-sent. I was very skeptical and untrusting of this stranger at first.. However, he has proven beyond measure that this is his spiritual gift (helping others by coming to their distress and working on their vehicles). I can't thank you enough for your assistance during my frustrated tribulation period. Only problem is the labor is overpriced. But it's mobile, I guess. Thank you, Mr. Roberts, for all you do. May God prosper you in all that you do!!!

notes: Places API ChIJqVQ0jOkb9YgRozLHehFrJbQ (4.8/201). +5 new. Robert named in all 5 review texts.
